title: Reymet Autem
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:ReymetAutem-Republic78.png]] |name=Reymet Autem |homeworld=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]][[Republic 46|''Republic'' 46]] |birth=[[42 BBY/Legends|42 BBY]]{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|news/13516_5.html|Senate Speeder Thief Arrested}} |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=Brown |feathers= |eyes=Green |skin=Light |cyber= |families=[[Autem family]] |parents=*[[Sagoro Autem]] *[[Sula Autem]] |partners= |siblings=[[Lissa Autem]] |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Reymet Autem,''' a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was the son of [[Sagoro Autem]]. Reckless by nature, he loved to participate in daredevil [[Swoop/Legends|swoop-bike]] racing through [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] garbage pits. Like his father, Reymet enrolled at the [[Senate Guard Academy|Guards' Academy]] due to his family's connection to the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]], but he did not like it. ==Biography== {{Quote|Are you a friend of Ferus Olin?"
"We're best friends ... Hey, are you his parents? You look like you could be."
"Yes, we're his parents ... Have you seen him this afternoon?"
"No, and that's weird, because he's in three of my classes..."
"Ferus told us that you know secret things about the school."
"I know some things ... Follow me.|Jedi Masters [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] meet [[Leadership School]] tech prodigy Reymet Autem|''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''}} Reymet Autem attended the [[Leadership School]] on [[Andara/Legends|Andara]], where he met [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] undercover "transfer students" [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ferus Olin]] in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]]. A computer, tech, and security systems genius who loved to play practical jokes, Reymet assisted them with the [[Mission to Andara|investigation]] of the son of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Berm Tarturi]], [[Gillam Tarturi]], who was allegedly kidnapped, but who had set up his own father for his staged murder, to avenge himself of him. In [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]], Reymet was hired at the Staff College on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Andara/Legends|Andara]], where he met [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Ferus Olin]] who were there to conduct research. Reymet became an expert when he manipulated the technical institutes' systems, which were being tested by Ferus. In the Guards' Academy, Reymet was a loner and had no friends, which he disclosed to Anakin Skywalker. After the disappearance of Ferus Olin, Reymet guided [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] to the Academy's ancient tunnels, from which they rescued Ferus. In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], Reymet (having been suspended from the Academy) unknowingly helped his uncle [[Venco Autem|Venco]] attempt to carry out his assassination attempt on [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]]. Already planning to go off-world with his girlfriend, [[Riao Siao]], Reymet fled, helped by his father, who distracted the other Senate Guards long enough for Reymet to flee arrest. [[File:Evan_Hessler.png|thumb|left|250px|Reymet in his guise of bounty hunter Evan Hessler]] Reymet was soon followed by his mother [[Sula Autem|Sula]] and sister [[Lissa Autem|Lissa]], who had decided to leave Sagoro. In the years that followed, Reymet became a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]], one of his aliases being [[Reymet Autem|Evan Hessler]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he was arrested for stealing a speeder belonging to [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]], after it was "borrowed" by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. However, after the war and the creation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Reymet made an effort to find his father. Sagoro's name had appeared on a list of potential seditionists, and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] personally saw to capturing Autem. Under the guise of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Reymet Autem|Evan Hessler]], Reymet succeeded in "capturing" his father, having thwarted [[Tartuta]] and [[Severian]]. Upon revealing his true identity, Reymet and his father fled [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to meet the rest of their awaiting family. ==Behind the scenes== Reymet's appearance changes in his two comic appearances; in the first, he has black hair and brown eyes, and in the second, brown hair and green eyes. In ''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' he had sandy hair and gray eyes. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' *[[Republic 46|''Republic'' 46]] {{1st}} *[[Republic 47|''Republic'' 47]] *[[Republic 48|''Republic'' 48]] *{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|news/13516_5.html|Senate Speeder Thief Arrested}} *''[[Jedi: Shaak Ti]]'' {{Imo}} *[[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Reymet Autem}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030213sagoro|text=Sagoro Autem}} *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|vehicle|anakinsspeeder|airspeeder, Anakin Skywalker's}} *{{DB|character|reymetautem|Autem, Reymet}} *{{DB|character|sagoroautem|Autem, Sagoro}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Reymet Autem |pl=Reymet Autem }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Autem, Reymet}} [[Category:Coruscanti]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Information brokers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
